headline: Pentair Showcases Impact and Progress in 2025 Sustainability Report
summary: LONDON, March 31, 2026--Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve and enjoy water, life’s most essential resource, today released its 2025 Sustainability Report, reporting on the Company’s efforts to build a more resilient future for its business and the planet.
